capabilities.title: Beeps While Primary Source Is Interrupted
capabilities.support_notes: Verified on Sandisolar SD-HYM-4862HWP after SmartESS shadow-learning identified the register mapping on 2026-06-17/18.
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether the inverter beeps when the primary source is interrupted.
capabilities.note: Register 304 mapping observed as SmartESS field sys_eybond_ctrl_52.

choices.label: Beeps OFF
choices.description: Do not beep when the primary source is interrupted.

choices.label: Beeps ON
choices.description: Beep when the primary source is interrupted.

capabilities.title: Battery Type
capabilities.support_notes: Verified on Sandisolar SD-HYM-4862HWP after SmartESS shadow-learning identified the register mapping on 2026-06-17/18. Editing remains guarded because battery profile changes affect charge-voltage behavior.
capabilities.note: Register 322 mapping observed as SmartESS field bat_eybond_ctrl_66.

capabilities.title: Time From C.V To Floating Charge
capabilities.support_notes: Verified on Sandisolar SD-HYM-4862HWP after SmartESS shadow-learning identified the register mapping on 2026-06-17/18.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the delay from constant-voltage charging to floating charge.
capabilities.note: Register 330 mapping observed as SmartESS field bat_eybond_ctrl_74.

capabilities.title: Auto AC Output
capabilities.support_notes: Verified on Sandisolar SD-HYM-4862HWP after SmartESS shadow-learning identified the register mapping on 2026-06-17/18.
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether AC output follows the inverter power switch state automatically.
capabilities.note: Register 338 mapping observed as SmartESS field sys_eybond_ctrl_82.

choices.label: Disable With Power Switch OFF
choices.description: Disable automatic AC output when the power switch is off.

choices.label: Enable With Power Switch ON
choices.description: Enable automatic AC output when the power switch is on.

capabilities.title: Forced Equalization Charging
capabilities.support_notes: Verified on Sandisolar SD-HYM-4862HWP after SmartESS shadow-learning identified the register mapping on 2026-06-17/18. Editing remains guarded because this is an explicit charge action.
capabilities.change_summary: Requests one forced battery equalization charging cycle.
capabilities.note: Write register 425 with value 1. Mapping observed as SmartESS field sys_forced_eq_charging.
